thread_emails.subject: Save the Date: Mike's Retirement Party - April 10th
thread_emails.body_text:
Save the Date!

Please join us to celebrate Mike Thompson's retirement after 30 years.

Date: Friday, April 10, 2026
Time: 5:00 PM - 8:00 PM
Location: TBD (details to follow)

More information coming soon!

HR Department

thread_emails.subject: Update: Mike's Retirement Party - Location Confirmed
thread_emails.body_text:
Update on Mike's Retirement Party!

We've secured a venue:

Date: Friday, April 10, 2026
Time: 5:00 PM - 8:00 PM
Location: The Grand Ballroom
          Hilton Garden Inn
          1000 Hotel Circle, San Jose, CA 95128

Dinner will be served. Please RSVP by April 3rd.

HR Department

thread_emails.subject: Final Reminder: Mike's Retirement Party Tomorrow!
thread_emails.body_text:
Final Reminder!

Mike's Retirement Party is TOMORROW:

Date: Friday, April 10, 2026
Time: 5:00 PM - 8:00 PM
Location: The Grand Ballroom
          Hilton Garden Inn
          1000 Hotel Circle, San Jose, CA 95128

Parking: Complimentary valet parking
Dress code: Business casual

Don't forget to sign Mike's card at the reception desk!

See you there!
HR Department
